Internal Product Overview

One dashboard.
Eighteen AI specialists.
Every application, handled.

Career Copilot turns a resume and a job posting into a complete, verified application package — tailored resume, ATS score, company research, gap analysis, interview prep, and outreach drafts — in minutes, not a weekend.

18AI agents, each with one job
15+documents produced per application
<5 minfrom upload to full package
The Problem

A serious application eats a weekend, one tab at a time.

Every candidate re-does the same fragmented work — and there's no way to know if any of it is actually good until a recruiter responds, or doesn't.

  • ~45 minDecoding the job postWhat's the real bar, versus boilerplate?
  • ~30 minResearching the companyCulture, products, recent news — from memory or a rushed search
  • ~90 minTailoring the resumeATS-safe and human-readable, without breaking either
  • ~60 minFinding the real gapsWhich weaknesses will a recruiter actually notice?
  • ~90 minInterview prepBuilding answers under time pressure, the night before
  • ~45 minOutreach & cover letterSix different documents, written from scratch each time
The Solution

18 specialists, one pipeline, no guesswork about what ran.

Career Copilot doesn't send one prompt and hope. It runs 18 purpose-built AI agents in the correct order — each one doing a single job well — then checks its own work before calling anything finished.

ExtractionRead the resume & job post
Resume AnalysisJD IntelligenceATS Optimization Resume RewriteGap AnalysisSkill Evidence Recruiter SimulationInterview CoachLinkedIn Optimization Application Assets
ResearchLive web research, not stale memory
Company IntelligenceLearning & CertificationCareer Strategy
SynthesisBuild on other agents' findings
Portfolio RecommendationFinal Report
GovernancePlan it, check it, sign off on it
PlannerCriticSupervisor
See It Work

A real run, screenshot by screenshot.

Nothing staged — this is the actual dashboard, running the actual 18-agent pipeline against a real resume and job posting.

1

Start a new analysis

Live counters at the top track every application, company, and resume version the team has ever run — zero to start.

career-copilot — New Analysis
2

One upload, a few fields

Resume, job description, company, role. That's the entire input — everything downstream is generated.

career-copilot — New Analysis (filled)
3

Watch it work, live

Running agents turn blue mid-task, completed ones turn green — the graph is generated from the real dependency chain, not a fixed diagram.

Live Execution Monitor
Live Activity Console
4

Get everything, organized — and signed off

Every run ends with a quality-gate verdict from the governance layer, then a folder of every document the team needs, ready to open.

Run complete — all 15 agents
Quality gate: passed with notes
Artifacts saved to outputs/…
5

Nothing gets lost afterward

Every past application, company profile, resume version, output file, execution log, and trend chart is one click away — and the agent catalog updates itself as the system grows.

Analytics

What Comes Out

One run produces the entire application package.

Every document is grounded in the candidate's actual resume and the actual job post — nothing is invented to fill a gap.

01

Tailored resumes

ATS, recruiter, startup, and enterprise versions — same facts, framed for each reader.

02

ATS score & report

A scored, itemized read on parsing compatibility and keyword coverage.

03

Company research

Live-researched culture, products, tech stack, and recent news — not memorized and stale.

04

Skill gap analysis

Requirement-by-requirement: present, missing, or present but weakly evidenced.

05

Interview questions

Real questions with resume-backed answers — or an honest gap flag where none exists.

06

Cover letter & outreach

Six drafted assets: cover letter, recruiter message, referral ask, follow-ups.

07

Learning plan

A sequenced plan to close real gaps, with real courses and a certification ROI read.

08

Go / no-go verdict

A single readiness signal from the governance layer — not a pile of files to judge yourself.

Why Trust It

It checks its own work before calling anything done.

✓

Nothing is invented. Where evidence is missing, the system says so — it never fabricates a fact, a source, or a story to fill a gap.

✓

A dedicated review agent re-checks every other agent's output — recomputing numbers, not just re-reading prose — before the run is marked ready.

✓

Real-world facts are researched live, not recalled from memory, so company details and market data stay current.

Caught in review, this quarter

The review agent found that one agent's stated total didn't match the sum of its own line items — "~45–55 hours" claimed, but the actual line items added to 30–44. Flagged automatically, fixed before delivery. That's the review layer working as designed.

Built To Stay Current

The system catalog updates itself.

Add, remove, or change an agent and the dashboard's execution graph, dependency map, and settings catalog reflect it automatically — no separate UI work required to keep pace with the product.

Settings — live agent catalog
History — every agent, every run
Where This Goes

Shipped, and what's next.

Shipped

Today

  • All 18 agents built and verified
  • Live dashboard, end to end
  • Full application history & analytics
Next

Validate at scale

  • Test against a wide range of real resumes
  • Track cost & accuracy per run
  • Multi-user access
Later

Prove the outcome

  • Correlate usage with interview & offer rates
  • Automate the full workflow end to end
  • Decide on pricing & access model
Try It

Run it on a real application this week.

The fastest way to evaluate Career Copilot is to run it against a role the team is actually hiring for, and read the output next to what we'd have produced by hand.

18 agents, live today
SQLite + Streamlit, runs locally, no infrastructure to stand up
Demo mode available with no API key for a first look
